case_title: PRESSURE GROUT COMPANY VS PLANT CONSTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY PRESSURE GROUT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT PLANT CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-31-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PLANT CONSTRUCTION
